text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was anything but smooth sailing to<n>get here, but
the Grand Concert is<n>finally upon us. The different
stages<n>are already seeing tremendous<n>crowds.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But we're just getting started. Next<n>up is "Girls'
Legend U."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I exchange a few words with<n><chrname>
before sending<n>her onstage. The whole venue is in
for a fun time!
